mechanism: KG path: corr_break â†’ asset â†’ has_aggression â†’ AggressionNode(burst). Flow-driven correlation breaks are self-sustaining: buyers pushing ETH's mark above index create funding pressure that attracts more positioning, keeping the asset decoupled from its pair.

title: Extreme long funding on HYPE predicts reversion
claim: When HYPE funding rate exceeds 2Ïƒ above rolling mean (direction=long, z=0.00), price reverts toward neutral within 1-2 funding epochs.
